s2.ptxt: Insert the stop light switch assembly until the body hits the cushion.

atten3.ptxt: When inserting the stop light switch assembly, support the pedal from behind so that the pedal is not pushed in.

s2.ptxt: Make a quarter turn clockwise to install the stop light switch assembly.

atten3.ptxt: When inserting the stop light switch assembly, support the pedal from behind so that the pedal is not pushed in.

s2.ptxt: Connect the stop light switch connector to the stop light switch assembly.
Check the protrusion of the rod (See page ).
Using the tilt and telescopic functions, fully lower and extend the steering wheel.
Connect the 2 connectors as shown in the illustration.
Secure the wire harness to the combination meter assembly.
Install the combination meter assembly as shown in the illustration.
Install the 4 screws.
Engage the 4 claws and the guide.
Install the instrument cluster finish panel with the 2 clips.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL (w/o Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws and 2 clips to install the lower instrument panel finish panel.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL (w/ Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Connect the connector.
Engage the 2 claws and 2 clips to install the lower instrument panel finish panel.
Connect the connector.
Engage the 3 claws and 2 clips to install the No. 1 instrument panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL LH

s2.ptxt: Connect the connector.
Engage the 3 claws and 3 clips.
Install the 4 screws <B>.
Install the lower instrument panel sub-assembly with the bolt <A>.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL COWL SIDE TRIM SUB-ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 clips.
Install the cowl side trim sub-assembly LH with the cowl side trim clip.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT DOOR SCUFF PLATE LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the 7 claws and 3 clips, then install the front door scuff plate LH.
